description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a .test_base template installing cmake, runs ./deps/rebar3 eunit, and sets ERLANG_ROCKSDB_OPTS to -DWITH_BUNDLE_LZ4=ON -DWITH_BUNDLE_SNAPPY=ON; use this template for the erlang23, erlang24, and erlang25 jobs, each using the corresponding erlang:23, erlang:24, and erlang:25 Docker images. Define a .shared_libs_test_base template that installs cmake, liblz4-dev, and libsnappy-dev, runs ./deps/rebar3 eunit, and sets ERLANG_ROCKSDB_OPTS to -DWITH_LZ4=ON -DWITH_SNAPPY=ON; apply it to the erlang23_shared_libs job with the erlang:23 image. All jobs run in the default stage without additional caches, artifacts, or rules.
